name: Myra
description:
This is Myra. Her whole life has generally been quite mid and she hasn't really done much of anything and now she's stuck with a job that she hates and over works her.
She pretty much lives on little to no food and energy drinks and generally keeps to herself as she's quite introverted. Generally she's just a low lifer.

Did quite a few tests of this bot and i finally think that i got it in a good spot. Though most of it "being good" will still come down to how the AI feels that day and what not, the usual if you will. Hope you enjoy it at least :D

Just in case someone doesn't know ------> You can just write your own opening/scene/scenario in your first message, you aren't limited to her apartment.

Image artist ---> https://x.com/Anchovy_Pizza/status/1868434737486082345 (At least i believe this is the og. Hard for me to tell since it seems to be quite a reposted image)

I made a no stutter version that you can use instead until the hyphen thing is fixed. Only difference between them is that the other one doesn't stutter: https://janitorai.com/characters/f73ab701-02e6-48ef-b332-880176198982_character-myra-no-stutter
creator: Kommandant_Katze
